headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace begins scheduled maintenance of cloud infrastructure systems

sentiment.reasoning: A 15% increase in customer acquisition is a positive leading indicator for future revenue growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
